name: libxml-regexp-perl
title: libxml-regexp-perl
summary: Perl module for regular expressions for XML tokens
description:
Perl module for regular expressions for XML tokens
The XML::RegExp module provides regular expressions for the following XML
tokens: BaseChar, Ideographic, Letter, Digit, Extender,
CombiningChar, NameChar, EntityRef, CharRef, Reference, Name,
NmToken, and AttValue.
.
The definitions of these tokens were taken from the XML spec
(Extensible Markup Language 1.0) at http://www.w3.org/TR/REC-xml.
.
Also contains the regular expressions for the following tokens from
the XML Namespaces spec at http://www.w3.org/TR/REC-xml-names:
NCNameChar, NCName, QName, Prefix and LocalPart.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libxml-regexp-perl because Perl module for regular expressions for XML tokens.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libxml-regexp-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libxml-regexp-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libxml-regexp-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
